metrolist-og.description: Original Metrolist source - reference for rebranding and upstream changes

elara-ui-designer.description: Expert UI/UX designer for Elara's glassmorphism player interface. Use when designing or modifying the player UI, glass components, or motion system.

elara-rebrand.description: Handles bulk rebranding operations: package rename, resource updates, directory moves. Use when doing find-replace across the codebase.

build.description: Build the Elara GMS debug APK
build.template:
Build the Elara app for debugging:

./gradlew :app:assembleGmsDebug

If it fails, read the error output carefully, fix the issue, and rebuild until successful.

build-release.description: Build the Elara GMS release APK (signed)
build-release.template:
Build the Elara release APK:

./gradlew :app:assembleGmsRelease

This requires a keystore at app/keystore/release.keystore with STORE_PASSWORD, KEY_ALIAS, and KEY_PASSWORD environment variables set.

lint.description: Run Android lint on the Elara app module
lint.template:
Run lint on the Elara app module:

./gradlew :app:lintGmsDebug

clean.template:
Clean all Elara build artifacts:

./gradlew clean
